nasb.text: “Be prepared, and prepare yourself, you and all your companies that are assembled about you, and be a guard for them.

esv.text: “Be ready and keep ready, you and all your hosts that are assembled about you, and be a guard for them.

cnv.text: “‘你要準備好，你和那聚集到你那裡的各隊都要準備好；你要作他們的大帥。

ccb.text: “‘你和你的联军都要预备好，你要做他们的统帅。
